explanation: Spotlight, Curtain, Script, and Rehearsal are all integral components or stages of a live theatrical play or stage production. A Podium is typically used for speeches, lectures, or debates, not as a primary element of a dramatic stage play.
The Colosseum, Aqueduct, Roman Forum, and Pantheon are all iconic architectural achievements of the Ancient Roman Empire. The Parthenon, however, is a renowned temple of Ancient Greece.

Rubber bands, Slinkys, balloons (when inflated), and bungee cords are all objects primarily known for their elastic properties and ability to stretch. A diamond, being one of the hardest and most rigid materials, does not possess this characteristic.
